title: Adding an item file when creating a sub-item
excerpt:
Hello, 
I would like that when I create a sub-element, the file located in the file column of the element is automatically added. 
Is it possible ? 
Thank you 
Jean

posts.author: Jean (D)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hello,

I would like that when I create a sub-element, the file located in the file column of the element is automatically added.

Is it possible ?

Thank you
Jean

posts.author: Dani (Dani Lester)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi @Jean

I’m afraid it’s not currently possible to have the file of the parent item automatically added to the subitem when it is created.
That said, if your subitems follow a specific pattern, and will always require the same file, you could use an automation to automatically add subitems whenever an item is created.

image946×450 9.42 KB

You can then click into the subitem and select the fields you’d like to be populated whenever a new subitem is created:

image1264×1104 38.6 KB

If you upload something into the file field, this will automatically be added to your new subitem!

Could this be an option for you?

Best,

Dani

posts.author: Dani (Dani Lester)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi @Jean

Did you need any more assistance here?

If not, please don’t forget to mark the previous post as the solution so other users can easily find it, and to close this thread
Feel free to ask any additional questions you have!

Best,
Dani
